title: Won’t move forward with complaint against Minister K.B. Ganesh Kumar, he apologised: wife
summary: Bindu Menon had levelled allegations of infidelity against Ganesh Kumar after he denied rumours circulating on social media regarding the matter

title: Two killed, one injured as speeding lorry crashes into vehicles on Hyderabad–Vijayawada highway
summary: Drivers of a bus and a lorry stepped out when their vehicles brushed against each other

title: NCERT issues 'unconditional, unqualified apology' over textbook with reference to 'corruption' in judiciary
summary: "The Director and Members of NCERT hereby tender an unconditional and unqualified apology for the said Chapter IV. The entire book has been withdrawn and is not available," NCERT said in a statement

title: UP govt signs pact with Hinduja Group firm to expand broadband connectivity
Oil Ministry sets up panel as commercial LPG shortage hits hospitality sector
summary: Industry sources say the disruption has already begun affecting operations in Mumbai and Bengaluru, as hotels and restaurants struggle to secure cooking gas

title: Four astronomy facilities announced in Union Budget to cost ₹3,500 crore, to be completed over a period of three to 13 years
summary: IIA Director Professor Annapurni Subramaniam informed that the projects will be completed over a period of three to 13 years

title: With discharge in excise case, Kejriwal is back to win lost turf and hearts
summary: Not only does the court order put AAP in a good light, but it also paints the Bharatiya Janata Party in a bad light, party leaders say

title: Gulbarga University alumni highlight climate change impact on women
summary: K. S. Aishwarya, lecturer in zoology, noted that gender inequality persists globally, with women owning far less wealth than men and remaining disproportionately represented among the poor
